subject: Commonly Used Discrete Random Variables
question: A machine that produces computer chips produces 3 defective chips out of 100. Computer chips are delvered to retailers in packages of 20 chips each. (a) A package is selected randomly. What is the probability that the package will contain at least 2 defective chips? (b) What is the probability that the tenth package selected is the third to contain at least two defective chips?
